items.step: Commit, push, and report closure receipts with current-turn learnings
step=wire CLI flag; owner=implementer; success_criteria=`seq token-usage --help` documents `--audit` and unsupported commands reject it.
step=add audit collector; owner=implementer; success_criteria=raw bounded token-count events produce duplicate/reset/null/missing-total counters before dedupe.
step=integrate output rows; owner=implementer; success_criteria=summary audit enriches one row and grouped audit appends one `row_kind=audit` row after bucket trimming.
step=add deterministic tests; owner=implementer; success_criteria=fixtures prove duplicate-last overcount, reset handling, all output modes, and non-audit compatibility.
step=update `$seq` docs; owner=implementer; success_criteria=skill shows `--audit` examples and states local-corpus-not-billing scope.

step=validate locally; owner=implementer; success_criteria=`zig build test`, relevant golden tests, `zig build bench -Doptimize=ReleaseFast -- --config perf/frozen/workload_config.json`, and real `~/.codex/sessions` audit run pass.

step=release; owner=implementer; success_criteria=next `seq` patch tag, successful release workflow, Homebrew formula update, strict audit, upgrade/test, installed `seq --version`, and installed `token-usage --audit` proof.
step=implement_cli_contract; owner=skills-zig implementer; success_criteria=`parse-arch collect` always emits stable read-depth fields and focused runs report `focused`.
step=extend_eval_suite; owner=skills-zig implementer; success_criteria=eval cases assert verdict/classes/suggestions and fail on regression.
step=local_build_proof; owner=skills-zig implementer; success_criteria=build/test/eval plus `.dotfiles` and `skills-zig` smoke checks pass using `./zig-out/bin/parse-arch`.
step=delete_dotfiles_helper; owner=.dotfiles implementer; success_criteria=helper file removed, docs/prompts use raw CLI, quick_validate passes, no helper references remain.
step=release_parse_arch_020; owner=release implementer; success_criteria=`parse-arch-v0.2.0` assets published for Darwin arm64 and Linux x86_64.
step=update_homebrew_tap; owner=tap implementer; success_criteria=formula version/SHA updated and brew audit/test/upgrade plus installed field smoke pass.

Add Codex launch/config wiring for CAS hook policy
Add CAS hook support preflight and classifier
Add CAS hook accumulator and JSON output
Wire hook policy across all CAS lanes

items.notes: Validation complete. Proof: zig build test-cas; zig build build-cas -Doptimize=ReleaseFast; CAS help surfaces expose --hooks; cas skill quick_validate; git diff --check in skills-zig and .dotfiles; live cas_instance_runner --hooks off passed over managed websocket; live cas_smoke_check --hooks off passed; temp CODEX_HOME UserPromptSubmit probe with cas_smoke_check --hooks require-observed observed hook/started and hook/completed with failureCode null; no app-server or CAS orphan processes remain.

items.step: Release CAS hook support and publish Homebrew tap
items.notes: Release complete. skills-zig commit 0c24d83ec343ba5ee1f32b38b5a83b145f97350b pushed to main; tag cas-v0.2.28 pushed; Release cas runs 25031201695 and 25031209698 passed; final release assets: cas-v0.2.28-darwin-arm64.tar.gz sha256 d0872955ea3237bc28e97ddda8e563a15e95bfa28e7238515ae33be70c380056, cas-v0.2.28-linux-x86_64.tar.gz sha256 7ad61bc9c6ccd56d5c7b75795b88794a7fa3c9dab33976ff9b5292e31896a855; homebrew-tap commit 49bdd8a pushed; brew update, HOMEBREW_NO_INSTALL_FROM_API=1 brew audit --strict tkersey/tap/cas, brew upgrade tkersey/tap/cas, brew test tkersey/tap/cas passed; installed cas and all companion binaries report 0.2.28; installed help surfaces expose --hooks; installed cas_smoke_check --hooks off, cas_instance_runner --hooks off, and temp CODEX_HOME require-observed hook smoke passed.

step=patch specialist-spawning skills; owner=implementer; success_criteria=`codebase-audit`, `codebase-archaeology`, `spec-pipeline`, `review-adjudication`, and `negative-ledger` require packet-native, scoped, evidence-bearing Codex-native specialist outputs where they spawn or consume specialists.

step=run fixed-point review and one-change challenge; owner=implementer; success_criteria=no material contract gaps remain across all touched skill surfaces and no stale or malformed packet path can be treated as closure evidence.

step=validate skill docs and corpus; owner=implementer; success_criteria=quick validation for every touched skill, relevant corpus validation if available, `$st` projection checks, and `git diff --check` pass.
step=run full local proof bundle; owner=implementer; success_criteria=all available builds, lints, and tests for this repo change set pass or any unavailable lane has an exact blocker.

items.step: step=patch fixed-point and closure skills; owner=implementer; success_criteria=`fixed-point-driver` and `verification-closure` reference the shared contract and preserve artifact-state, value-receipt, negative-evidence, and root-owned proof gates.

step=patch specialist-spawning skills; owner=implementer; success_criteria=`codebase-audit`, `codebase-archaeology`, `spec-pipeline`, `review-adjudication`, and `negative-ledger` require packet-native, scoped, evidence-bearing Codex-native specialist outputs where they spawn or consume specialists.

step=run fixed-point review and one-change challenge; owner=implementer; success_criteria=no material contract gaps remain across all touched skill surfaces and no stale or malformed packet path can be treated as closure evidence.

step=validate skill docs and corpus; owner=implementer; success_criteria=quick validation for every touched skill, relevant corpus validation if available, `$st` projection checks, and `git diff --check` pass.
step=run full local proof bundle; owner=implementer; success_criteria=all available builds, lints, and tests for this repo change set pass or any unavailable lane has an exact blocker.

proof.command: quick_validate touched skills; validate_skill_corpus --root .; stale ignored contract ref search; st doctor/prime/assert-projection; git diff --check scoped
proof.evidence_ref: rerun after moving shared contract to tracked codex/skills/references path: all touched skills valid; corpus OK 0 errors 38 warnings; no stale ignored contract refs in proposed plan/skills; projection OK; diff check OK; no build/test manifests discovered

items.step: step=ship validated change set; owner=implementer; success_criteria=`$ship` opens or updates a PR with concise validation proof and reports exact status without merging.

proof.command: git push -u origin skill/specialist-packet-contract; gh pr create --base main --head skill/specialist-packet-contract
proof.evidence_ref: PR #37 opened at https://github.com/tkersey/dotfiles/pull/37; branch skill/specialist-packet-contract pushed at 4b4175a
